title: Audio & MetaSounds
description: Understand Unreal's audio engine, spatialization, attenuation curves, Sound Cues, and MetaSounds.
learningObjectives: Differentiate standard Sound Wave assets from procedural Sound Cues
Configure 3D Spatialization and Attenuation (volume falloff over distance)
Build procedural synthesis audio patches using the MetaSounds node system

sections.title: Unreal Audio Pipelines
sections.content: Unreal's audio system synthesizes and directs game sounds. Sound Cues combine sound waves with math operators to randomize pitch and volume, preventing repetitive audio loops. MetaSounds introduces a procedural, node-based digital signal processing (DSP) synthesis engine, enabling sample-accurate audio patching and complex procedural sounds directly inside the game executable.

sections.title: Sound Attenuation
sections.content: Attenuation limits sound ranges. Placing a campfire sound in a level requires linking an Attenuation asset defining an inner radius (full volume) and falloff radius (silent) to prevent the audio from playing globally.
